title: olotrema brunnea
intro: Olotrema brunnea, also known as the 'yellow-flowering gentian', is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties that can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce the severity of colds and flu. The health benefits of Olotrema brunnea include its ability to alleviate symptoms of insomnia, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared by drying its roots and leaves, then using them to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
